title: notholaena lepida
intro: Notholaena lepida, also known as the delicate fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. Native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is known to have health benefits such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Notholaena lepida include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
